title: Shulker Tooltip
description: Move your mouse cursor over a shulker box to see what's inside.
body:
Have you ever wanted to see what's in a shulkerbox without placing it down to open it? With Shulker Tooltip you can! Move your cursor over a shulkerbox to see what's inside.

If you find any bugs/glitches please let me know.






  

  

  


Keys (configurable):

* Left Alt - Show Tooltip. Press and hold this key to change the tooltip.

* V - Toggle View. Press this key to toggle the Shulker Tooltip on or off.

* N - Show Contents. A key for an **experimental** GUI that opens the shulkerbox.

          

This mod is client side only. Do not install it on servers.

I have not made a fabric version. And I likely never will.

You are free to use this mod in any modpack. Please give credit if possible :)
